name: The Bunker
address: 4180 Guardian St Unit 109, Simi Valley, CA 93063
about: The Bunker Clubhouse is an adult-oriented entertainment venue in Simi Valley, featuring golf simulators and sports viewing. It utilizes Foresight-powered technology in its bays to simulate play on over 200 famous golf courses. The venue offers a casual environment with no dress code and no mandatory tee times. The space is divided into golf sim bays, an oversized sports lounge with numerous 4K TVs and a large projector, and an area for arcade and lawn games. Membership options are available for those seeking unlimited access to the golf bays.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-grade Foresight launch monitors providing high-quality data and club-fitting capabilities
Access to over 200 world-famous golf courses in a single tap
No tee times required, allowing for flexible play on demand
Casual, zero dress code environment for a relaxed golf experience
Ability to practice with data tracking and on-screen games

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of a kitchen or food service

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use in the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers craft drinks on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to complete 18 holes is not specified on the website, as the experience depends on the player's pace and number of people sharing the bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, The Bunker Clubhouse is described as a hangout for 'grown-ups' and is not marketed as a kid-friendly environment.
